task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Tussey_Mountain' ground station is created with the correct coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Edit Ground Station' dialog or the ground station list in GPredict showing the name 'Tussey_Mountain', Latitude 40.7270, Longitude -77.8023 (or 77.8023 W), and Altitude 640m.

task_completion.description: Verify that a module named 'FieldDay' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a module tab, window, or configuration dialog in GPredict bearing the name 'FieldDay'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the five required satellites are added to the 'FieldDay' module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'FieldDay' module's satellite list, radar view, or configuration dialog. It must include ISS (25544), SO-50 (27607), AO-7 (7530), AO-85 (40967), and AO-91 (43017).

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'FieldDay' module is assigned to the 'Tussey_Mountain' ground station.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Module properties' dialog for 'FieldDay' or the main module view to confirm the selected ground station is 'Tussey_Mountain'.

task_completion.description: Verify that GPredict timestamps are set to display in UTC.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the GPredict 'Preferences' -> 'General' -> 'Time format' setting with 'UTC' selected, or check that the main clock in the GPredict UI explicitly indicates 'UTC'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the GPredict graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the GPredict application open with its configuration dialogs being actively used.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the GUI by directly editing configuration files in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the configuration was done via GPredict's menus and dialogs, not by writing to files in `~/.config/Gpredict/` using nano, vim, or gedit.

integrity.description: Verify the results are genuinely displayed in the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final screenshots should show the operational GPredict interface displaying the configured module, not just a terminal window or a text file echoing the task description.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Ground Station Name: 'Tussey_Mountain'. Coordinates: Latitude 40.7270, Longitude -77.8023 (which is 77.8023 W), Altitude 640m. Module Name: 'FieldDay'. Required Satellites (NORAD IDs): ISS (25544), SO-50 (27607), AO-7 (7530), AO-85 (40967), AO-91 (43017). Time format must be set to UTC.
